name: Vane
compose:
name: slashnode-perplexica
services:
  web:
    image: itzcrazykns1337/vane:v1.12.2
    container_name: perplexica
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - web_data-app_data:/home/perplexica/data
      - web_data-uploads:/home/perplexica/uploads
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3444:3000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-app_data:
    name: slashnode-perplexica_web_data-app_data
  web_data-uploads:
    name: slashnode-perplexica_web_data-uploads
